description_for_human: Payment infrastructure for AI agents. Fund via Telegram Stars or USDC, spend via API, track everything.
description_for_model: AgentPay provides payment capabilities for AI agents. Use this to check balance, spend funds, transfer between agents, manage on-chain USDC wallets (Base, Polygon, BNB, Solana), register webhooks, access x402-gated resources, and view agent identity/trust scores. Authenticate with an API key via X-API-Key header.
